overview.description: The Nelson Select ETF (NELS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund seeks capital appreciation by investing in equities, fixed income, and cash/cash equivalents. The actively managed ETF employs a quantitative approach with its subjective assessments. NELS was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by Nelson.
